rulings.Case Title: JAMES FAHEY VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 24, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities DENIED. Fourth Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support 1-4 causes of action. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY L. NEHER VS. MATTHEW HUMPHREY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 24, 2019 line 9. Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Hearing Required. THe Court finds that Defendants have shifted the burden. The burned is now on Plaintiff to create a triable issue of fact. Plaintiff to address triable issues of fact at the hearing. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: AGATON GUALBERTO ET AL VS. OCWEN LOAN SERVICING LLC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 24, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC, DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to February 28, 2019. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than January 31, 2019 with a cover letter addressing the new hearing date. Additionally, based on the declarations submitted by defendants' counsel, Plaintiff and his counsel failed to engage in meet and confer as required by CCP 430.41. By no later than January 31, 2019 Plaintiff's counsel shall file a declaration addressing this apparent failure to comply. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BRANISLAV RADIKOVIC VS. YING FAI CHAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 24, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT YING CHAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address why the motion should not go off calendar. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: AUDREY CHAING VS. EUGENE MOROZOV ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 24, 2019 line 6. PLAINTIFF AUDREY CHAING'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION Hearing Required. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT VS. LISA D HOWARD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 24, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT LISA HOWARD'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address calculation of rent due for July 2018. By no later than 9:00 a.m. Plaintiff shall file a supplemental brief (not to exceed 2 pages) specifying the method and the process of calculation yielding $1,352.52 rent demanded. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Former owner of the property is not a necessary party. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the position that allegations regarding service of notices under SFRO 37.9(k)(2) and 37.9D(e) have to be included in the complaint to state a cause of action. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. AROYTIMESE POWELL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 24, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT ARTISE POWELL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Notice not uncertain and is sufficient to support an unlawful detainer action. Whether repairs have in fact been made, whether the cost of labor/materials was as demanded, etc. are questions of fact that cannot be addressed on a demurrer. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that such allegations must be included in the Notice or Complaint. = (501/CFH)
